name: Crabby Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the crab meat, bread crumbs, onion, cheese, salt, and minced parsley.
2. Add the chopped mushroom stems to the mixture.
3. Stir in the beaten egg and hot sauce to taste.
4. Stuff the mixture into the mushroom caps.
5. Bake at 300°F (150°C) until tender, about 15 to 30 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
